name: @nextcommerce/campaigns-os
description: Toolkit for agent-assisted NEXT campaign builds.

scripts.check: npm run build:spec && node --test ./src/qa-browser.test.mjs ./src/qa-verdict.test.mjs ./src/qa-publish.test.mjs ./src/findings.test.mjs ./src/run-record.test.mjs ./src/doctor-demo-ref.test.mjs ./src/doctor-built-output.test.mjs ./src/doctor-commerce-shell.test.mjs ./src/doctor-adapter-contract.test.mjs ./src/doctor-template-contract.test.mjs ./src/doctor-store-profile.test.mjs ./src/doctor-spec-validation.test.mjs ./src/brand-theme.test.mjs ./scripts/refresh-starter-template-catalog.test.mjs && npm run check:spec && node ./scripts/check-fixtures.mjs && node ./scripts/check-private-strings.mjs && node ./scripts/check-template-doctrine.mjs && node ./scripts/check-cart-readiness-contract.mjs && npm run check:pack
